raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached to it; to prevent the stacked assembly from shifting or tipping during separation and lifting, the left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without obstruction.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is pressed down and stabilized against box_1, reducing relative motion while the other arm works on the attachment."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm is stabilizing box_2 from above; there is lateral clearance on at least one side of box_2 to apply a controlled shear force to break the attachment between box_2 and box_1 without sliding the whole stack.",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is released (or sufficiently loosened) while box_2 remains stabilized on top of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The attachment is released and the right arm can guide box_2 away without the claw; there is a clear region of tabletop adjacent to box_1 to temporarily relocate box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is slid/positioned onto a free area of the table next to box_1, no longer on top of or attached to box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is now unobstructed (box_2 removed); there is sufficient clearance on both left and right sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to make firm lateral contact and apply lifting force; the box size (30 cm) exceeds claw capability, so a two-arm pinch/support grasp without claws is required.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held and lifted off the tabletop under dual-arm support."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached to it; to prevent the stacked assembly from shifting or tipping during separation and lifting, the left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without obstruction.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is pressed down and stabilized against box_1, reducing relative motion while the other arm works on the attachment.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm is stabilizing box_2 from above; there is lateral clearance on at least one side of box_2 to apply a controlled shear force to break the attachment between box_2 and box_1 without sliding the whole stack.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is released (or sufficiently loosened) while box_2 remains stabilized on top of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The attachment is released and the right arm can guide box_2 away without the claw; there is a clear region of tabletop adjacent to box_1 to temporarily relocate box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is slid/positioned onto a free area of the table next to box_1, no longer on top of or attached to box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is now unobstructed (box_2 removed); there is sufficient clearance on both left and right sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to make firm lateral contact and apply lifting force; the box size (30 cm) exceeds claw capability, so a two-arm pinch/support grasp without claws is required.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held and lifted off the tabletop under dual-arm support.
